questions.question_text: Consider the Use Case: An Institution is willing to deploy an ERP to monitor all the academic activities of the students and faculty and wish to provide the alerts and updates to the end users about the attendance, marks, fee etc., dynamically. Make your own assumptions and answer the following questions To implement the above use case, which computing methodology will you suggest, draw its architecture and explain its salient features over any other? What is the criteria to select the Cloud Computing Deployment model and explain the significance of each parameters?

Explain in detail the suitability of PaaS service model for the Q1 application with neat diagram and justify your answer. Recommend the suitable cloud deployment model for Q1 use case and justify your answer?

a. You been asked to use the Cloud Computing for Q1 use case and explain the layered architecture of it with neat diagram and what are the different challenges needs to be taken into account while deployment of the cloud. b. Compare any three cloud computing service providers w.e.t service model, security, management, services etc and which one you suggest for above use case

Which cloud service provides you recommend for deployment of the Q1 in IGDTUW, explain its architecture and what are merits and demerits of the same? What are merits and demerits of the Amazon cloud services over Azure cloud services and explain w.r.t security, management, services etc.
